Getting Comfortable With TypeScript Generics (and Vue 3 Generics)

Generics is one of TypeScript's most important features — it can dramatically simplify your code and make it more readable. But it's also one of the hardest things for beginners to wrap their head around, so this post walks through TypeScript generics.
Monorepo? Another Way to Manage Projects — Building a Vue3 Monorepo With Vite + pnpm

What is a Monorepo? How is it different from a regular project setup? I had a need for one recently, so I wrote this up. The post walks through Monolith vs Multi vs Monorepo, plus a hands-on Vue3 Monorepo build using Vite + pnpm.
Fix the 'Virtual script not found' Error in a Vue Project

After switching to a newer version of Volar, I opened a new project and got the "Virtual script not found, may missing script lang=\"ts\" / \"allowJs\": true / jsconfig.json.volar" error. So here's a quick note on the problem and how to fix it.
Fixing the 'getInspectorTree' Error When Using VeeValidate in Vue 3

This post is a quick note on how to fix the "An error occurred in hook 'getInspectorTree' with payload" error you get when using VeeValidate. While I'm at it, I'll also cover another oddly behaving VeeValidate issue — the duplicated `name` attribute problem.
Different Ways to Grab DOM Elements with $refs in Vue 3
In real-world dev you often need to grab DOM elements. This post is a quick collection of techniques for using $refs in Vue 3.
ref, toRef, and toRefs in Vue 3
ref, toRef, and toRefs are everyday tools for Vue 3 Composition API developers, but the three are subtly different. This post walks through how each one works.
